title: Cherry Samurai Temple
description: Adds a Cherry Samurai Temple with samurai enemies, armor, and katanas
body:
## Samurai Temple Mod

Adds a Samurai Temple in Cherry Grove biomes — a multi-layered structure filled with battles, secrets, new loot rewards and a challenging miniboss at the end
![Temple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/081bca515ee737a29918d7e83035139791689dff.jpeg)
## Temple Features
- Large structure with multiple layers
- Beautifully decorated in traditional Samurai style
- Loot and hidden secrets on each level
- Miniboss fight at the top

## New Mobs
- Samurai: Attacks on sight with a katana, chance to drop the weapon
- Steve Samurai: A stronger miniboss version with a special katana
![Samurai](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de5e85e5218095a3eb7ce43356d575a62670c6a7.jpeg)

## Weapons
- Katana: Faster than regular swords, repairable with iron ingots
- Cherry Katana: Stronger version that gives a speed boost when held, repairable with amethyst shards
  ![Katanas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21fc28f7050cca9947651e3e2624e4271ed59fbd.jpeg)
##   Armor
- Samurai Armor: Scattered throughout the temple, weaker than iron armor, repairable with iron nuggets
  ![Samurai Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d90572d2b7dd0e4452232417da4f2e77c95c0ee.jpeg)


You are free to include this mod in your modpacks

Made by Leonxkingx and MadeBySanny

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4d81eaa4f299387285acbf2e999be7cc29329e1.jpeg)
